evals.name: ambiguous-exploration-choice
evals.prompt: Can you explore this repo and help with the docs? I'm not sure what I need yet.
evals.expected_output: Asks one compact outcome question offering codebase map, trace/impact, docs audit, docs update, and combined work; recommends one option and does not begin broad exploration or write files before the choice.
files: fixture: small service with src/, tests/, README.md, and ARCHITECTURE.md
assertions: Presents concrete bounded outcomes instead of asking an open-ended what-do-you-want question
Recommends one outcome from request context
Performs no repository write before the user selects a write outcome
Asks at most one additional scope/deliverable question

evals.name: explicit-native-impact-trace
evals.prompt: Trace enqueue from the API route through the queue, list callers and impacted tests, and cite the source. Do not change files.
evals.expected_output: Skips redundant outcome clarification, probes required native commands, returns a verified definition/reference/flow/impact trace with path:line citations and limitations, and changes no files.
files: fixture: queue service with direct and dynamic callers; no optional provider configured
assertions: Does not force the generic chooser because target and output are explicit
Checks required command availability before use and does not install optional providers
Separates observed relationships from inferred/dynamic edges
Reopens and verifies consequential citations against repository files
Reports affected tests and explicit limitations

evals.name: docs-refresh-missing-gate-dependency
evals.prompt: Refresh the contributor setup guide from the actual manifests and verify the docs build. Assume this machine has none of the dependencies installed.
evals.expected_output: Inventories and probes only required dependencies, proposes the repository-declared locked install for a missing essential and waits for explicit approval, then updates docs and verifies only after a successful install/probe; no silent provider or global install.
files: fixture: package manifest + lockfile + stale setup guide + docs build script; runtime/package manager unavailable
assertions: Derives runtime, package manager, and docs command from repository files
Probes each essential dependency and treats absence as unprepared state
Explains exact command, scope, writes, and network use before requesting install approval
Does not install, download, edit manifests, or claim verification before approval
Uses no optional provider and does not treat its absence as degraded completion
If approval is withheld, reports the blocked gate honestly without fabricating green
